prompt:
Theme Direction: Oriental Zen Minimalist Poster
Style Branch: High-contrast media-friendly style
Main Content: An ancient-style character standing under the eaves, slightly tilting their head to listen to wind chimes
Emotional Motif: Relaxed, listening, summer clarity
Scenes and Imagery: Turquoise blue eave corners, amber orange wind chime tassels, warm white walls, a few light spots, and bamboo shadows
Composition and Space: Off-center composition, character located on one side at the bottom, eave corners cutting in from the top, large bright open space left on the wall
Color Control: Warm white as the wall and background base, turquoise blue for eave corners and minor shadow structures, amber orange only for wind chime tassels and local light accents, character presented as a dark cyan silhouette; avoid overall blue or orange tint
Light and Texture: Natural daylight, clear edges, light paper texture, small amount of grain, bright and transparent
Aspect Ratio: 9:16
Supplementary Requirements: Character posture should be quiet and restrained, not too many wind chimes, the overall feel should be a refreshing New Oriental cover style
